# After-Hours Auto-Reply

> Replies with a configurable away/closing message when a customer messages outside your business hours.

![type: extension](https://img.shields.io/badge/type-extension-blue.svg)
![license: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-green.svg)
![built for OpenWA](https://img.shields.io/badge/OpenWA-%E2%89%A5%200.6.2-25D366.svg)

## Features

- **Per-day business hours** — each weekday (`mon`..`sun`) has its own open/close window or is closed.
- **Timezone-aware** — the schedule is interpreted in a configurable IANA `timezone` (e.g. `Asia/Jakarta`),
  computed via `Intl`, independent of the host clock.
- **Quoted replies, throttled** — the away message is sent as a reply, at most once per chat per
  `cooldownSec`, so a customer sending several after-hours messages isn't spammed.
- **Direct-chat by default** — group chats are ignored unless `respondInGroups` is enabled.
- **Least privilege** — declares only `messages:send`.
- **Fail-fast config** — a malformed schedule (bad day/time, `open >= close`, all-closed) or an unknown
  timezone shows as `ERROR` in the dashboard rather than misbehaving silently.

## Schedule

`schedule` is a JSON object mapping `mon`..`sun` to a `"HH:MM-HH:MM"` window or `null` (closed); an
absent day is also closed. Times are 24-hour, `open < close` (same-day):

```json
{ "mon": "09:00-17:00", "tue": "09:00-17:00", "wed": "09:00-17:00",
  "thu": "09:00-17:00", "fri": "09:00-17:00", "sat": "09:00-13:00", "sun": null }
```

## Install

```bash
node package.mjs after-hours    # produces after-hours.zip at the repo root

curl -X POST "https://your-openwa-host/plugins/install" \
  -H "X-API-Key: <ADMIN_API_KEY>" -F "file=@after-hours.zip"

curl -X PUT "https://your-openwa-host/plugins/after-hours/config" \
  -H "X-API-Key: <ADMIN_API_KEY>" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{ "config": { "schedule": "{\"mon\":\"09:00-17:00\",\"sun\":null}", "timezone": "Asia/Jakarta", "awayMessage": "Terima kasih! Kami sedang tutup dan akan membalas di jam kerja." } }'

curl -X POST "https://your-openwa-host/plugins/after-hours/enable" \
  -H "X-API-Key: <ADMIN_API_KEY>"
```

Or download the packaged `.zip` from [Releases](https://github.com/rmyndharis/OpenWA-plugins/releases)
and upload it in the dashboard **Plugins → Install** (or the **Catalog** tab).

## Configuration

| Key | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `schedule` | yes | — | JSON object: `mon`..`sun` → `"HH:MM-HH:MM"` or `null` (closed) |
| `timezone` | no | `UTC` | IANA timezone the schedule is interpreted in |
| `awayMessage` | yes | — | Reply sent outside business hours |
| `cooldownSec` | no | `3600` | Min seconds between after-hours replies per chat; 0 = always |
| `respondInGroups` | no | `false` | Whether to reply in group chats |

## Compatibility

Targets OpenWA **≥ 0.6.2** (sandboxed runtime with `Intl` timezone data and `onConfigChange` forwarding,
so schedule edits apply live without a re-enable).
